query: low resolution pixelated mosaic blocky digital image
message: sub:digital_artifacts/pixelation — anti_aesthetic — pixel mosaic, blocky low-res, color-cell grids

response.objective_caption: A frontal portrait of an older light-skinned man from the upper chest up, composed of numerous small rectangular image tiles arranged in a regular grid. He has short brown hair, visible forehead and facial wrinkles, and wears a white collared shirt. The tiles forming the face display warm pink and peach tones, while those in the background and clothing shift to pale whites and light grays. The subject faces directly forward with a solemn, neutral expression.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A surreal frontal portrait of an older light-skinned man assembled entirely from thousands of small rectangular tiles depicting repeated motifs of white and amber objects arranged in neat rows. Shown from the upper chest up, the man has short brown hair, visible facial wrinkles, and a white collared shirt. His solemn forward-facing expression emerges from the incongruous grid of miniature repetitive objects, creating a dreamlike juxtaposition between mass-produced items and human likeness.
